prerequisites.label: Install/repair Vulkan support
prerequisites.description: Repair or install GPU vendor Vulkan components used by Jakal's Vulkan backend.

prerequisites.label: Install Intel Level Zero runtime
prerequisites.description: Install or repair Intel GPU runtime support for Level Zero.

prerequisites.label: Install OpenCL runtime
prerequisites.description: Install or repair a vendor OpenCL runtime as accelerator fallback.

prerequisites.label: Skip and use existing drivers
prerequisites.description: Keep the current machine drivers and install only the Jakal runtime.
